chart.title: Plastic waste exports
chart.subtitle: Plastic waste that is exported by all modes of transport in a given year.
chart.citation: United Nations Comtrade Database (2023); United Nations Comtrade Database (2025)

Exports of plastic waste via all modes o.titleShort: Exports of plastic waste via all modes of transport
Exports of plastic waste via all modes o.titleLong: Exports of plastic waste via all modes of transport
Exports of plastic waste via all modes o.descriptionShort: The amount of plastic waste that a country exports, measured in tonnes.
descriptionKey: This covers plastic waste classified as HS 3915 in UN trade statistics.
It includes all transport methods: air, sea, road, rail, inland waterways, and cases where the transport mode wasn't specified.
This includes re-exports (when a country imports plastic waste and then exports it again).
Not all countries report transport mode details for every year.
Exports of plastic waste via all modes o.citationShort: United Nations Comtrade Database (2025); United Nations Comtrade Database (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data
Exports of plastic waste via all modes o.citationLong: United Nations Comtrade Database (2025); United Nations Comtrade Database (2023) – with minor processing by Our World in Data. “Exports of plastic waste via all modes of transport” [dataset]. United Nations Comtrade Database, “Comtrade Database” [original data].
